discount_offer.label: Discount or pricing concession
discount_offer.pattern: discount|price reduction|special offer|% off|reduced rate|free month|complimentary

negative_tone.label: Unprofessional or negative tone
negative_tone.pattern: your fault|you should have|unfortunately you|we can't help|not our problem|blame

guards.label: Block AI from approving refunds
guards.description: AI cannot approve, promise, or confirm refunds — only acknowledge the request and escalate to billing team

guards.label: Block AI from offering discounts
guards.description: AI cannot offer discounts, credits, or pricing concessions — these require sales team authorization

guards.label: Block legal claims in replies
guards.description: AI cannot make legal statements, reference contract terms, or discuss liability — route to legal team

guards.label: Block disclosure of internal information
guards.description: AI cannot reveal internal systems, pricing structures, employee details, or other customer data

guards.label: Pause on unprofessional tone
guards.description: Reply contains language that may appear unprofessional or blame-shifting — requires human review before sending

guards.label: Pause on legal/escalation threats
guards.description: Customer has mentioned legal action, regulators, or public complaints — route to senior support with full context

guards.label: Pause on account deletion requests
guards.description: Account deletion and data removal requests must be verified and processed by a human agent — GDPR/privacy compliance required
